reviews.comment:
Si tenés que obtener el registro internacional, es rápido, lleva fotocopia del DNI, del carnet de conducir, dos fotos carnet 4x4 de frente, y en 15 minutos lo obtenes

(Translated by Google)
If you need to obtain the international registration, it's fast, bring a photocopy of your ID, your driver's license, two front-facing 4x4 passport photos, and you'll get it in 15 minutes.
